headline: Is It Time To Reassess Fair Isaac (FICO) After Its Sharp Share Price Retreat?
summary: Wondering whether Fair Isaac at around US$1,181.82 is starting to look attractive again, or still pricing in a lot of optimism. The stock has risen 8.2% over the last week and 10.1% over the last month, yet remains down 28.1% year to date and has fallen 46.4% over the last year, so recent trading has been choppy for anyone thinking about timing an entry. Over the last few months, headlines around Fair Isaac have focused on the stock's retreat from earlier highs and what that means for growth...

headline: Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO): Among Stocks That Will Make You Rich Over the Next Decade
summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) is among the 10 Stocks That Will Make You Rich Over the Next Decade. Considering the company’s dominant market share in the credit-scoring industry and its double-digit revenue growth trajectory over the next five years, the stock has significant potential to help investors build wealth.
